name: color-picker
title: Color Picker
description: Swatch trigger with hex trailing, hover border, and channel editors.

api.description: Pill swatch trigger with optional hex or clear trailing, hover border controls, and channel editors in a popover.

props.name: value
props.description: Current color as a hex string (required).

props.name: onChange
props.description: Called when the color changes (required).

props.name: label
props.description: Accessible name for the swatch trigger.

props.name: trailing
props.description: Optional trailing control: show hex text, or a clear action. Pill triggers use the hover border contract.

props.name: onClear
props.description: Required when trailing is "clear".

props.name: clearLabel
props.description: Accessible label for the clear control.

props.name: hoverBorder
props.description: Instance hover border on pill triggers (hex or clear). Omit to inherit the theme. Set false to keep the resting border. Set true to force the hover border on. Dot only triggers do not use this contract.

props.name: hoverBorderColor
props.description: Hover border color when hover is active. Prefer tokens such as var(--foreground). Sets --df-color-picker-hover-border.

props.name: className
props.description: Additional styles on the pill trigger or swatch root.

props.name: data-df="color-picker-trigger"
props.description: Pill shell for trailing hex or clear. Owns resting and hover border chrome.

props.name: data-hover-border
props.description: true or false when hoverBorder is set. Omit to inherit data-df-hover-border from the host.

props.name: data-trailing
props.description: hex or clear on the pill trigger.

props.name: Popover editors
props.description: Opened panel supports hex, rgb, hsl, and hsb channel modes (not separate props). Placement flips when there is not enough space.

groups.title: Tokens
groups.description: Theme defaults live on :root. Override these globally or on a local host.

props.name: --df-color-picker-width
props.description: Popover panel width.

props.name: --df-color-picker-height
props.description: Popover panel height.

props.name: --df-color-picker-hex-width
props.description: Fixed width for the hex label on the pill trigger so it does not reflow while dragging.

props.name: --df-color-picker-border
props.description: Resting border on the pill trigger.

props.name: --df-hover-border
props.description: Theme field hover border. on paints the ink hover border; off keeps the resting border. Runtime gating uses data-df-hover-border on html. Set with df-ui init --hover-border. Default on.

props.name: --df-color-picker-hover-border
props.description: Hover border when the theme or instance enables hover. Defaults to the ink foreground. Override with hoverBorderColor.

props.name: --df-color-picker-bg
props.description: Pill trigger fill.

props.name: --df-shadow-picker-thumb
props.description: Ring around the channel thumb.

props.name: --df-corner-shape
props.description: Theme corner curve for all kit chrome. round = circular arcs; smooth = continuous squircle. Set with df-ui init --corner-shape, or override on :root. Default round.
